web.description: Gemini (Google) SVG Logos - A free AI / LLM model icon set covering major brands and models. Download SVG, PNG, and vectors.
web.markdown:
[All Icons](https://lobehub.com/icons) Gemini

# Gemini (Google) Model Logos

## Download official Gemini icon, supporting React / SVG / PNG / WebP   [Official Site: https://deepmind.google/technologies/gemini](https://deepmind.google/technologies/gemini)

Download Icon

[GithubContribute on GitHub](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons)

![Gemini (Google) Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/gemini-color.png)

## Gemini Logos Icon Preview

Various modes and formats for icon download are provided below. If you need CDN service, please refer to the following documentation: [CDN Usage](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons#-cdn-usage)

![Gemini (Google) Mono Logo (LightMod)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/gemini.png)

Download Icon

## Gemini Logos React Components

I'm an Agent

I'm a Human

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons

```
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons
```

Use the React icon package for more variant support, please refer to the following documentation: [@lobehub/icons](https://icons.lobehub.com/components/gemini)

Gemini

![GeminiMono.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

GeminiMono.tsx

```
import { Gemini } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Gemini size={56} />;
```

Gemini

![GeminiColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

GeminiColor.tsx

```
import { Gemini } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Gemini.Color size={56} />;
```

Gemini

![GeminiText.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

GeminiText.tsx

```
import { Gemini } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Gemini.Text size={56} />;
```

GeminiGemini

![GeminiCombine.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

GeminiCombine.tsx

```
import { Gemini } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Gemini.Combine size={56} />;
```

GeminiGemini

![GeminiCombineColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

GeminiCombineColor.tsx

```
import { Gemini } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Gemini.Combine size={56} type={'color'}/>;
```

Gemini

![GeminiAvatar.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

GeminiAvatar.tsx

```
import { Gemini } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Gemini.Avatar size={56} />;
```

## Summary

The gemini-images Skill exposes the nano-banana Gemini CLI extension for prompt-driven image generation, icon and pattern design, diagram creation, and web/app asset production. Use it when a user asks to generate images with Gemini, create an app icon, favicon, pattern, or visual diagram. Features include configurable size presets (favicon/app icon/responsive sizes), format exports (PNG, SVG), transparent backgrounds, color-palette and style controls, reproducible seeds and templates, and batch generation for multiple variants. It supports prompt refinement, layout constraints, and simple diagram labeling—making it suitable for UI/app design, branding, marketing assets, game icons, and prototype visuals. Core advantages are rapid iteration, automated CLI integration into build pipelines, consistent branding through repeatable parameters, and fast production of web-ready image assets.

SKILL.md

# Gemini Image Generation (nano-banana)

Generate images, icons, patterns, diagrams, and visual stories using the nano-banana extension for Gemini CLI.

## Prerequisites [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#prerequisites)

1. **Gemini CLI** installed and authenticated
2. **API key** (required — OAuth alone is not sufficient for MCP extensions):





![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell



























```
export GEMINI_API_KEY="your-api-key"
# or extension-specific:
export NANOBANANA_GEMINI_API_KEY="your-api-key"
```

3. **nano-banana extension** installed:





![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell



























```
gemini extensions install https://github.com/gemini-cli-extensions/nanobanana
```

4. **Restart Gemini CLI** after installation to activate commands

### Model Selection [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#model-selection)

**Always use the pro model by default.** Only fallback to flash if it errors or the user explicitly requests speed.

| Model | Role | Quality |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gemini-3.1-pro-image-preview` | **Default** — all image generation | Highest quality |
| `gemini-2.5-flash-image` | **Fallback** — on error or if user requests speed | Good quality, faster |

When invoking gemini for image tasks, **always prepend the model env var** to ensure the pro model is used:

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# Default: pro model (always use this unless it fails)
NANOBANANA_MODEL=gemini-3.1-pro-image-preview gemini --yolo -p '/generate "your prompt"'

# Fallback: flash model (only on error or explicit user request)
NANOBANANA_MODEL=gemini-2.5-flash-image gemini --yolo -p '/generate "your prompt"'
```

If `NANOBANANA_MODEL` is already set in the environment, respect the user's choice. Only override if unset.

**Error handling:** If the pro model returns a quota/capacity/availability error, automatically retry with the flash model and inform the user which model produced the output.

### Headless Mode Permissions [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#headless-mode-permissions)

nano-banana tools require explicit permission in headless mode. Use `--yolo` to auto-approve image generation tool calls:

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
NANOBANANA_MODEL=gemini-3.1-pro-image-preview gemini --yolo -p '/generate "your prompt here"'
```

**Note:**`--yolo` is ONLY permitted for image generation via nano-banana. Never use `--yolo` for code reviews or text analysis — use `--sandbox` instead. Gemini's role outside of image creation is strictly advisory.

## Commands Reference [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#commands-reference)

All nano-banana commands run inside a Gemini CLI session. From Claude Code, invoke them via headless mode or instruct the user to run them interactively.

**Important:** When executing any command below from Claude Code, always prepend the model and permissions:

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
NANOBANANA_MODEL=gemini-3.1-pro-image-preview gemini --yolo -p '<command>'
```

The examples below show the command portion only for brevity.

### /generate - Create Images [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#generate-create-images)

Create single or multiple images from text prompts.

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# Basic generation
gemini -p '/generate "watercolor painting of a fox in a snowy forest"'

# Multiple variations
gemini -p '/generate "mountain landscape" --count=4'

# With artistic styles
gemini -p '/generate "city skyline" --styles="watercolor,oil-painting,sketch,photorealistic"'

# With variation types
gemini -p '/generate "portrait" --variations="lighting,angle,mood"'

# Grid output
gemini -p '/generate "abstract art" --count=4 --format=grid'

# Reproducible with seed
gemini -p '/generate "robot mascot" --seed=42 --count=3'
```

**Style options:** watercolor, oil-painting, sketch, photorealistic, anime, pixel-art, vintage, modern, abstract, minimalist

**Variation types:** lighting, angle, color-palette, composition, mood, season, time-of-day

### /icon - Generate App Icons & UI Elements [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#icon-generate-app-icons-ui-elements)

Create icons optimized for specific use cases with proper sizing.

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# App icon set
gemini -p '/icon "coffee cup logo" --sizes="64,128,256,512" --type="app-icon"'

# Favicon
gemini -p '/icon "letter M monogram" --sizes="16,32,64" --type="favicon"'

# UI elements
gemini -p '/icon "settings gear" --sizes="24,48" --type="ui-element" --style="minimal"'

# With rounded corners (app store style)
gemini -p '/icon "music note" --sizes="128,256,512,1024" --type="app-icon" --corners="round"'

# Transparent background
gemini -p '/icon "chat bubble" --sizes="64,128" --background="transparent"'
```

**Icon types:** app-icon, favicon, ui-element

**Icon styles:** flat, skeuomorphic, minimal, modern

**Available sizes:** 16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 512, 1024

### /pattern - Seamless Patterns & Textures [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#pattern-seamless-patterns-textures)

Create tileable patterns for backgrounds and textures.

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# Geometric pattern
gemini -p '/pattern "geometric triangles" --type="seamless" --style="geometric"'

# Organic texture
gemini -p '/pattern "marble texture" --type="texture" --style="organic" --size="512x512"'

# Wallpaper
gemini -p '/pattern "forest landscape" --type="wallpaper" --colors="duotone"'

# Dense tech pattern
gemini -p '/pattern "circuit board" --style="tech" --density="dense"'
```

**Pattern types:** seamless, texture, wallpaper

**Pattern styles:** geometric, organic, abstract, floral, tech

**Density:** sparse, medium, dense

**Color schemes:** mono, duotone, colorful

**Sizes:** 128x128, 256x256, 512x512

### /story - Sequential Visual Narratives [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#story-sequential-visual-narratives)

Generate series of images that tell a story or show a process.

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# Process documentation
gemini -p '/story "seed growing into a tree" --steps=4 --type="process"'

# Tutorial steps
gemini -p '/story "making pour-over coffee" --steps=6 --type="tutorial"'

# Timeline
gemini -p '/story "evolution of web design 1995-2025" --steps=5 --type="timeline"'

# Comic layout
gemini -p '/story "a day in the life of a developer" --steps=4 --layout="comic"'
```

**Story types:** story, process, tutorial, timeline

**Layouts:** separate, grid, comic

**Transitions:** smooth, dramatic, fade

### /diagram - Technical Diagrams [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#diagram-technical-diagrams)

Create technical visualizations and architectural diagrams.

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# System architecture
gemini -p '/diagram "microservices e-commerce architecture" --type="architecture" --style="technical"'

# Flowchart
gemini -p '/diagram "user authentication flow" --type="flowchart" --layout="vertical"'

# Database schema
gemini -p '/diagram "social media database schema" --type="database" --complexity="detailed"'

# Network topology
gemini -p '/diagram "corporate network with DMZ" --type="network"'

# Wireframe
gemini -p '/diagram "mobile app settings page" --type="wireframe" --style="clean"'

# Mind map
gemini -p '/diagram "machine learning concepts" --type="mindmap" --complexity="comprehensive"'
```

**Diagram types:** flowchart, architecture, network, database, wireframe, mindmap, sequence

**Diagram styles:** professional, clean, hand-drawn, technical

**Layouts:** horizontal, vertical, hierarchical, circular

**Complexity:** simple, detailed, comprehensive

### /edit - Modify Existing Images [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#edit-modify-existing-images)

Edit images using natural language instructions.

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# Edit an existing image
gemini -p '/edit "path/to/image.png" "change the sky to sunset colors"'

# Style transfer
gemini -p '/edit "photo.jpg" "convert to watercolor painting style"'
```

### /restore - Enhance & Repair Photos [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#restore-enhance-repair-photos)

Restore old or damaged photos.

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
gemini -p '/restore "old-family-photo.jpg"'
```

### /nanobanana - Natural Language Interface [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#nanobanana-natural-language-interface)

Flexible natural language interface when specific commands don't fit.

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
gemini -p '/nanobanana "create a set of social media banners for a tech startup, 1200x630px"'
```

## Integration Patterns with Claude Code [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#integration-patterns-with-claude-code)

### Generate Icons for a Project [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#generate-icons-for-a-project)

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# 1. Generate icon set
gemini -p '/icon "your app concept" --sizes="16,32,64,128,256,512,1024" --type="app-icon" --style="modern"'

# 2. Copy to project
cp ~/generated-icons/* public/icons/
```

### Create Diagrams for Documentation [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#create-diagrams-for-documentation)

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# 1. Generate architecture diagram
gemini -p '/diagram "your system architecture" --type="architecture" --style="professional" --complexity="detailed"'

# 2. Move to docs
cp ~/generated-diagrams/* docs/images/
```

### Create Visual Assets for README [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#create-visual-assets-for-readme)

![*.bash](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/console.svg)

Shell

```
# Generate a hero image
gemini -p '/generate "developer workspace with code and coffee, tech illustration style" --styles="modern,minimalist"'

# Generate process diagrams
gemini -p '/story "how our CI/CD pipeline works" --steps=4 --type="process" --style="consistent"'
```

## File Management [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#file-management)

nano-banana automatically:

- Generates descriptive filenames from prompts
- Prevents duplicate filenames
- Organizes output by command type

Generated files typically appear in:

- Current working directory, or
- `~/gemini-output/` (configurable)

## Tips [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/skills/nthplusio-functional-claude-gemini-images\#tips)

- **Be descriptive**: More detailed prompts produce better results
- **Use --preview**: Add `--preview` to auto-open generated images
- **Iterate**: Use `/edit` to refine generated images
- **Batch sizes**: `/icon` with multiple `--sizes` is more efficient than separate calls
- **Consistent style**: For sets, use `--seed` to maintain visual consistency
- **Pro model**: Set `NANOBANANA_MODEL=gemini-3.1-pro-image-preview` for highest quality output
